sidebar.switchError: Unable to switch workspace. Please try again.

sync_wizard.title: Connect & Sync
sync_wizard.description: Connect your Airtable base and choose which tables to sync.
sync_wizard.step1_description: Connect your Airtable account to get started. A popup will open for you to authorize access.
sync_wizard.step2_description: Choose which Airtable base you'd like to sync with this workspace.
sync_wizard.no_bases: No bases found. Make sure your Airtable account has at least one base.
sync_wizard.step3_description: Select the tables to sync and optionally add filters to limit which records are imported.
sync_wizard.quota_exceeded: The selected tables exceed your plan's record quota. Remove tables or add filters to reduce the count.
sync_wizard.large_table_warning: This table has over 10,000 records. Consider adding filters to reduce sync time.
sync_wizard.sync_started: Sync started successfully. Records will appear as they are imported.
sync_wizard.error_load_bases: Failed to load bases. Please try again.
sync_wizard.error_load_tables: Failed to load tables. Please try again.
sync_wizard.error_start_sync: Failed to start sync. Please try again.
sync_wizard.error_quota_check: Failed to check quota. Please try again.
